'''Oswald Strepp''' was a [[GeNode]] who held the rank of [[First Sergeant/Legends|First Sergeant]], and for a brief time, served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], he was dispatched to [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]].<ref name="Pax Empirica" />

During the battle, Strepp died setting off a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] that killed not only many [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], but also himself.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />
